channel.title: LoopFlow blog
channel.description: Guides on self-correcting AI coding loops, AI agents, and loop engineering.

item.title: What is an AI coding loop?
item.description: An AI coding loop is a self-correcting agent workflow that plans, acts, and verifies against a real check until it passes.

item.title: How to make Claude Code self-correct
item.description: Make Claude Code self-correct and retry until tests pass with a plain-English .loop file.

item.title: One-shot prompts vs self-correcting loops
item.description: Why a one-shot prompt stops whether or not it worked, and what a self-correcting loop adds.

item.title: I Was the For-Loop
item.description: A personal essay on what changed when AI started writing the code: the five decisions behind every task.
